title: New Clarity Act Draft May Drop This Week, Sources Tell CoinDesk
dek: Several sources told CoinDesk that a new draft of the Clarity Act may drop this week. Challenges to the legislation remain.
author: Crypto Cronkite
key_fact: Multiple sources told CoinDesk a new draft of the Clarity Act may drop this week.
bottom_line: A fresh draft would mark a live development in the U.S. market-structure legislation storyline, with direct regulatory stakes. What to watch is whether the draft materializes this week and how it addresses the outstanding challenges.
body: Several sources told CoinDesk that a new draft of the Clarity Act may drop this week, according to the outlet's reporting.
The same reporting notes that challenges to the legislation remain.
